title: QPESUMS 3D Radar Derived Products and Chunk Benchmark Dataset
description: A STAC catalog description for the final project dataset workflow. The workflow converts 2024 QPESUMS 3D radar HDF5 files to analysis-ready Zarr stores, derives echo-top and VIL radar products, exports typhoon-event subsets, and benchmarks chunking strategies for downstream computation.

providers.name: Central Weather Administration / QPESUMS radar data
Final project ETL and benchmark workflow

source_hdf5.title: Source QPESUMS HDF5 files
source_hdf5.description: Raw 10-minute QPESUMS 3D radar HDF5 files. These files are not stored in the GitHub repository because they are large external data assets.

derived_yearly_zarr.title: Yearly derived radar Zarr store
derived_yearly_zarr.description: Analysis-ready yearly Zarr store containing MAXDBZ, DBZH, TOP18, TOP45, and VIL.

event_exports.title: Typhoon event Zarr exports
event_exports.description: Event-window Zarr subsets for typhoon cases, including VIL, EchoTop_18, and EchoTop_45 products.

benchmark_outputs.title: Benchmark reports, CSV summaries, and figures
benchmark_outputs.description: Performance outputs generated by the chunking benchmark scripts and notebook. These are generated artifacts and are not required in the GitHub repository.
